highlights_html: Renew Cozy Spa offers exceptional bodywork using hot stones and CBD oils for deep relaxation and rejuvenation
highlights_text: Renew Cozy Spa offers exceptional bodywork using hot stones and CBD oils for deep relaxation and rejuvenation
about_deal_html:
This statement has not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration (FDA). This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease.

Feeling worn out from the daily grind? Renew Cozy Spa has just what you need. Specializing in rejuvenating bodywork, their massages offer benefits like reduced muscle tension and improved circulation. With treatments designed to provide deep relaxation, it's the perfect way to unwind.

What We Offer

  • One 60-Minute CBD Oil Massage with Hot Stone
  • One 90-Minute CBD oil Massage with Hot Stone
  • One 60-Minute Hot Stone Massage with Aromatherapy
  • One 90-Minute Hot Stone Massage with Aromatherapy

Why You Should Grab The Offer

This offer stands out due to its blend of tranquil escape options right in Midtown Manhattan's heart. Whether you're drawn to the benefits of CBD oil or seek aromatic bliss through tailored aromatherapy sessions combined with hot stone therapy, each option promises unique relaxation paths. The expertise in foot reflexology ensures comprehensive well-being beyond typical spa offerings. With late-night availability including holidays, flexibility accommodates even the busiest schedules—perfect for spontaneous self-care moments. Choosing this deal means experiencing tailored massages that target stress reduction while promoting overall wellness.

review_quotes.text: Although I chose to have a 30 min massage in stead of the 90 min. My groupon was for,I was happy with the massage ,I feel I could have been offered another 30 min massage that a later date though ,I would recommend the place
review_quotes.author: Linda

review_quotes.text: We had an amazing experience getting massages for myself, my daughter, and my son. Each massage therapist was fantastic—so professional and attentive to our needs. The place was spotless and had a refreshing, pleasant scent. We all left feeling relaxed and rejuvenated. Highly recommend!
review_quotes.author: Jessica

review_quotes.text: It was fabulous. The Spa was amazing.  Great location. Street level. Beautiful interior. We were greeted with warm smiles and a friendly atmosphere. Then we have the CBD 90 minute massage we both rated it a 10 out of 10 they said the mood and they were very professional and made us feel very comfortable. We will definitely go back again and highly recommended. You will be glad that you did.
review_quotes.author: Ann

review_quotes.text: Amazing spa! I felt rejuvenated after
review_quotes.author: Guest

review_quotes.text: The staff was friendly and caring. Mike gave the best massage. I will be going back for a great massage that was given. Thank you so much.
review_quotes.author: Charity
